entry.instruction: Enter Monday morning. Wait 15-20 min after open for spread to tighten. Limit order at mid (9.70) or better. Skip if gap > 2%.

exit.instruction: Time-decay-aware exits: take 40% day-1 / 35% day-2 / 25% day-3 / 15% day-4 profit. Hard stop at 50% loss. Exit if delta < 0.10. Breakeven requires 4.9% move to $364.70 (weekly expected move: 6.8%).

thesis: Intel shows perfect momentum (100) and trend persistence (95) scores in a semiconductor sector that's capturing AI/chip narrative flows. With unusual options activity flagging institutional positioning and no earnings this week, INTC offers clean technical exposure to the semi trade without binary event risk that plagues AMD.

reasons: VIX regime stable — good for weekly holds
Macro data inline with expectations — less directional clarity

entry.instruction: Enter Monday morning. Wait 15-20 min after open for spread to tighten. Limit order at mid (5.11) or better. Skip if gap > 2%.

exit.instruction: Time-decay-aware exits: take 40% day-1 / 35% day-2 / 25% day-3 / 15% day-4 profit. Hard stop at 50% loss. Exit if delta < 0.10. Breakeven requires 1.1% move to $172.39 (weekly expected move: 6.6%).

thesis: RTX provides critical portfolio hedge as the only put among top candidates, with strong momentum (100) and persistence (85) scores supporting the downside thesis. The -7.7% drop despite raising guidance suggests market skepticism about execution, and with earnings already past, the technical breakdown can play out without event volatility.
